suggestion: Install Ollama and pull required models for local AI inference
justification: Ollama provides failsafe AI inference when API keys are exhausted or unavailable

suggestion: Implement fallback provider selection when primary LLM fails
justification: System should gracefully degrade when primary LLM provider is unavailable

suggestion: Implement robust input validation for all incoming data streams to prevent invalid data from entering the system.
justification: Invalid inputs can cause unexpected errors, crashes, or security vulnerabilities. Robust validation ensures data quality and system stability.

suggestion: Add comprehensive checks for missing values and outliers in preprocessing stage to ensure data integrity.
justification: Missing or outlier values can skew results, leading to inaccurate analysis. Early detection helps maintain data quality.

suggestion: Implement stratified sampling for training/test/validation splits to preserve class distribution and improve model generalization.
justification: Uneven class distributions can lead to biased models. Stratified sampling ensures representative subsets, enhancing model performance.

suggestion: Include confidence intervals and standard deviations in evaluation metrics to provide a more comprehensive view of model performance.
justification: Reporting only point estimates can be misleading. Including confidence intervals gives a better understanding of model variability and reliability.
